cacheStorageTab.hotCacheIntro: The hot cache promotes frequently-queried tables into cache. Leave the URL empty to use the embedded in-process cache.
cacheStorageTab.warmIntro: Warm-tier tables are promoted to landed replicas after repeated queries, and the engine's filesystem read-cache keeps their data on local SSD. Applied on restart.
cacheStorageTab.warmMaxRowsLabel: Do not promote above N rows
cacheStorageTab.mvDefaultTtlHint: Refresh interval for materialized views that do not specify their own.
cacheStorageTab.materializeIntroPrefix: Durable store where non-attachable sources (OpenAPI, GraphQL) and materialized views are landed. Leave empty to use the active federation engine's default
cacheStorageTab.materializeIntroNoDefault: — this engine declares none, so a URL is required
cacheStorageTab.savedRestartRequired: Saved. Restart the service to apply.
